description: Commodity Channel Index - identifies cyclical trends, overbought/oversold levels
Moving Average Convergence Divergence - trend-following momentum indicator showing relationship between two EMAs
Rate of Change - measures percentage change in price over period, momentum indicator
True Strength Index - double-smoothed momentum showing trend direction
Parabolic SAR - trailing stop and reversal indicator, identifies trend changes
On Balance Volume - cumulative volume indicator confirming price trends
Chaikin Money Flow - measures accumulation/distribution over period
Relative Strength Index - momentum oscillator measuring speed/change of price movements (overbought >70, oversold <30)
Money Flow Index - volume-weighted RSI, measures buying/selling pressure
Percentage Price Oscillator - MACD expressed as percentage, normalized momentum
Average Directional Index - measures trend strength (>25 strong trend, <20 weak/ranging)
Choppiness Index - measures if market is trending or ranging (>61.8 choppy)
